FREN

Private club · Laval

Le Parloir

An underground sanctuary devoted to collectors of exceptional wines.
Access by invitation only.

Request an invitation

The Concept

A world apart, reserved for a select few

Le Parloir is a subterranean private club tucked beneath the heart of Laval. A place where silence is a luxury, each bottle tells a story, and privacy is absolute. Here, collectors gather in complete discretion.

—

Discretion

Confidential access, concealed entrance

—

Excellence

State-of-the-art preservation technology

—

Exclusivity

A strictly limited membership

Private Cellars

Your collection, protected

Each cellar is a private, sealed, and controlled space. Temperature, humidity, and security are orchestrated with precision to preserve your rarest bottles. Independent access, 24 hours a day, in the strictest confidence.

  • Precision climate control
  • Secure biometric access
  • Digital inventory of your collection
  • Advisory on acquiring grand crus
Learn more

Private Lounges

The art of hosting

Intimate lounges with refined lines, designed for private dinners, business meetings, and evenings among connoisseurs. Every detail, from furnishings to lighting, creates an atmosphere of absolute refinement.

Lounges

Private

Capacity

2 to 20

Service

Tailored

Ambience

Intimate

Reserve a lounge

Events

Moments to remember

Private Tastings

Rare cuvees guided by our sommeliers within the intimacy of our cellars.

→

Collectors' Dinners

Exclusive gatherings centered on exceptional vintages and fine gastronomy.

→

Masterclasses

Deepen your knowledge with some of the world's leading wine experts.

→
Events calendar

Membership

Join the circle

Membership at Le Parloir is extended by invitation or through sponsorship from an existing member. Capacity is intentionally limited in order to preserve the exclusivity and intimacy of our community.

"Prestige is not found in display, but in restraint."

— Le Parloir
Submit a request

Reply within 48 hours · Strictly confidential
